US-M2.2.S2-01.text: I need to have details fields list on the ticket
US-M2.2.S2-01.author: you
US-M2.2.S2-01.agent_note: Added full form-field list to notes: Overview (Job title, Account, Grade, Type, Interview mode, Due date, Tech stack) + JD Detail (About the role, Responsibilities, Requirements, Nice to have), with required/optional flags.

US-M1.2.S2-01.text: Tạm thời màn detail sẽ ẩn cho member?
US-M1.2.S2-01.author: you
US-M1.2.S2-01.agent_note: Removed Member from roles + added note: profile detail is temporarily hidden for Members (they browse the list only, US-M1.2.S1-05).

US-M1.2.S1-05.text: All member can access vào màn này
US-M1.2.S1-05.author: you
US-M1.2.S1-05.agent_note: Rewrote story from 'view own record only' to 'browse the employee directory' so all Members can access the list screen; profile detail stays restricted.

US-M1.2.S1-04.text: Template import sẽ do bên mình tự tạo, mình phải có 1 button để download template
US-M1.2.S1-04.author: you
US-M1.2.S1-04.agent_note: Feedback is about Import, not the EM/TL directory scope it was attached to. Added a download-template AC + org-provided-template note to the import story US-M1.2.S5-01.

US-M1.2.S4-01.text: Luồng add member này chỉ là manually
US-M1.2.S4-01.author: you
US-M1.2.S4-01.agent_note: Added note clarifying this is the manual add-member flow only — distinct from create-from-candidate (S4-03) and bulk import (S5-01).

US-M1.2.S4-02.text: Làm luồng parsing CV đơn giản như con EMS luôn
US-M1.2.S4-02.author: you
US-M1.2.S4-02.agent_note: Extended S4-02 to parse the CV and pre-fill onboarding fields (simple, EMS-style, HR reviews); added AC + note, re-estimated 2→5.

US-M1.2.S4-03.text: Sprint 2 sau khi con Hiring nó chỉn chu
US-M1.2.S4-03.author: you
US-M1.2.S4-03.agent_note: Added note: targeted for Sprint 2, after Hiring (M2) stabilizes. Already depends on M2 via external_deps.
